master_row.title: Chern Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Field Superposition with Constraint] The total magnetic field configuration: \begin{equation} \vec{B}_{\text{total}} = \vec{B}_{\text{dipole}_1} + \vec{B}_{\text{dipole}_2} + \vec{B}_{\text{constraint}} + \vec{B}_{\text{quantum}} \end{equation} where $\vec{B}_{\text{constraint}}$ ensures topological stability via Lagrange multiplier: \begin{equation} \vec{B}_{\text{constraint}} = \lambda(\vec{r},t) \nabla \times \left[\vec{A}_{\text{gauge}} + \frac{\theta}{2\pi}\vec{K}_{\text{Chern-Simons}}\right] \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Total Field Configuration’.
master_row.dictionary: Chern Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation — B_constraint = λ(r,t) ∇ × [A_gauge + (θ)/(2π)K_Chern-Simons ]
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00AllEdit\analysis_all_edit_focus_11_22\output\all_edit_equation_arc_full.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.
